title: AgentTelemetry
description: Structured telemetry record for a single subagent task. Each subagent emits one record per task with start/end times, tool calls, and permission requests.

agent_name.description: Name of the subagent profile as defined in the template frontmatter.

task_id.description: Unique identifier for this task instance.

parent_task_id.description: Task ID of the parent coordinator task, if applicable.

task_summary.description: One-line summary of what the task asked the agent to do.

start_time.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp recorded before any work begins.

end_time.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp recorded after the final handoff. Null until the task ends.

tool_calls.description: Chronological log of every tool call made during the task.

command.description: Exact command executed (for exec) or file path (for read/write/edit). Null for other tools.

purpose.description: One-sentence explanation of why the tool was called.

tokens_input.description: Input tokens consumed by the tool call, if the runtime provides it.

tokens_output.description: Output tokens produced by the tool call, if the runtime provides it.

tokens_total.description: Total tokens consumed by the tool call, if the runtime provides it.

permission_required.description: True if the tool call required user approval before running.

permission_requests.description: Log of every permission request or blocked tool call, even if it was also recorded in tool_calls.

tool.description: Tool or command that required permission.

reason.description: Why the tool was needed and what the agent was trying to accomplish.

notes.description: Optional human-readable summary, blockers, or permission gaps to fix.
